arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is out of contract next summer with Liverpool supporters desperate for him to stay at the club

arts.ttl: Liverpool now hold key advantage over Newcastle in race for centre-back transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool would reportedly be the favoured destination for Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, who is also still on the radar of Newcastle United. arts.ttl: Richard Keys attacks Liverpool's Mohamed Salah 'con' after Gary Neville claim live on Sky Sports
arts.sum: Liverpool beat Chelsea 2-1 at Anfield on Sunday with Mohamed Salah scoring the opening goal from the penalty spot, but Richard Keys believes the Reds were fortunate

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah replacement identified as Liverpool contract theory emerges
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah could leave Liverpool on a free transfer at the end of the season and former Reds midfielder Dietmar Hamann believes they should sign Omar Marmoush to replace him

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why former Liverpool player Ryan Kent's contract at Fenerbahce was cancelled after he was frozen out by Jose Mourinho and former boss
arts.sum: Despite signing a four-year deal after joining from Rangers in 2023, Kent managed just 10 starts, scoring one goal - on his full debut.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Bundesliga defender 'attracting interest' from Premier League leaders, Newcastle United
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle United are allegedly contemplating whether to do battle for a £42m-rated Bundesliga defender.

arts.ttl: Club “now confident” of agreement with Liverpool transfer target
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly confident of reaching an agreement with Joshua Kimmich over a new contract despite transfer links with Liverpool and others. arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Liverpool predictions: Reds to continue winning run in Germany
arts.sum: Both RB Leipzig and Liverpool have been in fine form of late and Tom Hill expects the Reds to prevail in an exciting encounter in Germany on Wednesday night in the Champions League.
